zotero.abstractNote: Foolbox is a Python library that lets you easily benchmark the robustness of machine learning models. It provides access to a large number of adversarial attacks, which can be used to fool models and test their robustness. Foolbox Native is a complete rewrite of Foolbox that is designed to be fast and easy to use with PyTorch, TensorFlow, and JAX. It is built on top of eager execution and provides a unified interface for all three frameworks.
